chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI FRA No. 21 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 18.09.2025 ---------- None present for petitioner. No intimation is received. A cautionary order was passed on last date in light of constant absence of petitioner and his counsel. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
